svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Cursor"> <diagram id="lms-architecture" name="Arquitectura LMS"> <mxGraphModel dx="1643" dy="961" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" value="Plataforma LMS — Diagrama de Arquitectura con Trust Boundaries" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="600" x="280" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-actors" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="Actores (Internet — no confiable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="1080" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actor-est" parent="zone-actors" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Estudiante" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="30" x="120" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actor-doc" parent="zone-actors" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Docente" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="30" x="320" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actor-adm" parent="zone-actors" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Administrador" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="30" x="520" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="actor-atk" parent="zone-actors" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Atacante externo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="30" x="880" y="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-tb01" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="TB-01 — Usuarios ↔ Aplicación" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="1080" x="40" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frontend" parent="zone-tb01" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1" value="Frontend Vue.js
(SPA — Cloud)
T01" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="440" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-tb02" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="TB-02 — Frontend ↔ Backend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1080" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" parent="zone-tb02" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1" value="Django Backend
REST API + JWT
T02" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="440" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod-auth" parent="zone-tb02" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Auth Service
T04" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="120" x="80" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod-courses" parent="zone-tb02" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Courses" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="230" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod-exams" parent="zone-tb02" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Exams" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="360" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod-forums" parent="zone-tb02" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Forums
T05" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="490" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod-cert" parent="zone-tb02" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Certificates" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="110" x="620" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod-audit" parent="zone-tb02" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Audit Log
A10" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="100" x="760" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-tb03" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="TB-03 — Backend ↔ Servicios Externos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1080" x="40" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cdn" parent="zone-tb03" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="CDN Videos
Contenido A07
T06" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="120" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-cert" parent="zone-tb03" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="API Certificados
Firma digital A06
T07" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="180" x="460" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="email" parent="zone-tb03" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Email Service
Notificaciones
T08" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="820" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zone-tb04" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;startSize=30;" value="TB-04 — Backend ↔ Datos Persistentes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="1080" x="40" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postgres" parent="zone-tb04" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1" value="PostgreSQL
A01–A06, A09, A10
T03" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="460" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor-est" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="frontend"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1-label" connectable="0" parent="e1" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="HTTPS / TLS 1.3" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor-doc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="frontend"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor-adm" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="frontend"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="570" y="193" /> <mxPoint x="580" y="193" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="actor-atk" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#b85450;" target="frontend"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="580" y="130" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4-label" connectable="0" parent="e4" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontColor=#b85450;" value="Superficie de ataque" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="frontend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="backend"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5-label" connectable="0" parent="e5" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="REST API + Bearer JWT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="10" y="-10" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="mod-auth"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="mod-courses"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="mod-exams"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="mod-forums"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="mod-cert"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="cdn"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11-label" connectable="0" parent="e11" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="Pre-signed URLs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="api-cert"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12-label" connectable="0" parent="e12" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="HTTPS + API Key" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" target="email"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="postgres"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14-label" connectable="0" parent="e14" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="SQL (ORM Django)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="Leyenda: TB = Trust Boundary | Txx = Activo tecnológico | Axx = Activo de información" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="600" x="40" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
